- Import: `import { BlogPostCard } from "@poukai-inc/ui"` or `"@poukai-inc/ui/organisms/BlogPostCard"`.

```tsx
// (a) Full card with link:
<BlogPostCard title="Closing the pilot gap" lede="How teams ship AI." date="12 May 2026" author="Arian Z." href="/blog/post" />

// (b) Title only:
<BlogPostCard title="Closing the pilot gap" />
```

### BlogList
- Organism layer. Blog index ŌĆö vertical sequence of `BlogPostCard` previews with optional `Pagination` slot.
- Root element: `<section aria-label="Blog posts">`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, BlogListProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "BlogList"`.
- Props: `posts` (required `BlogPostCardProps[]`), `pagination` (optional `ReactNode`), `size` (`"default" | "tight"`, default `"default"`), `aria-label` (string, default `"Blog posts"`).
- Cards are rendered as `<ul role="list"><li><BlogPostCard /></li>ŌĆ”</ul>`. Gap between items: `--space-4`.
- `pagination` slot: wrapped in `<footer>` with `border-top: var(--hairline-w) solid var(--hairline)` and `margin-block-start: var(--space-12)`.
- `size="default"` ŌåÆ `padding-block: var(--space-16)`. `size="tight"` ŌåÆ `padding-block: var(--space-12)`.
- A11y: named `<section>` is a region landmark. `<ul role="list">` restores list semantics in Safari/VoiceOver. Pagination slot is consumer-owned.
- Do NOT render with zero posts ŌĆö gate on `posts.length > 0` and use `<EmptyState>` for the empty case.
- Tokens: `--space-4`, `--space-12`, `--space-16`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`.
- Import: `import { BlogList } from "@poukai-inc/ui"` or `"@poukai-inc/ui/organisms/BlogList"`.

```tsx
// (a) Default:
<BlogList posts={posts} />

// (b) With pagination:
<BlogList posts={posts} pagination={<Pagination ŌĆ” />} />

// (c) Category page:
<BlogList posts={posts} aria-label="Posts tagged design" size="tight" />
```
```

### PriceTier
- Single pricing-plan card molecule. Use inside a `PricingTable` organism grid ŌĆö do not render at full page width in isolation.
- Root element: `<article>` with `aria-label` derived from `name` (e.g. `"Pro plan"`). Each tier is an independently meaningful unit; `article` is the correct landmark.
- `name` (required string) ŌĆö tier label, rendered as `<h3>`.
- `price` (required string) ŌĆö displayed at `--fs-stat` / `--font-serif` scale. Examples: `"$29"`, `"Free"`, `"Custom"`.
- `per` (optional string) ŌĆö period label at `--fs-meta` / `--fg-muted`. Omit for free or custom tiers. Renders as `"/ month"` etc.
- `bullets` (optional `string[]`, default `[]`) ŌĆö feature list as `<ul>` / `<li>`. List is omitted entirely when empty.
- `bulletIcon` (optional ReactNode) ŌĆö leading icon per bullet. Wrapped in `<span aria-hidden="true">`. When absent, native list marker is shown.
- `cta` (required ReactNode) ŌĆö CTA slot; renders full-width at card bottom. Typically a `<Button>`.
- `featured` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö elevates to `--bg-elevated` surface with `--hairline` border; shows badge above name.
- `featuredLabel` (optional string, default `"Recommended"`) ŌĆö overrides badge text when `featured` is true.
- Featured badge renders as `<p aria-label="Recommended">` ŌĆö no heading semantics; visual annotation only. Uses `--accent` color.
- Divider: `1px` `--hairline` rule between price block and bullet list. Token: `--hairline-w`, `--hairline`.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--bg-elevated`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--accent`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--font-serif`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-stat`, `--fs-h3`, `--fs-meta`, `--fs-micro`, `--tracking-micro`, `--tracking-stat`, `--fs-body`, `--lh-body`, `--lh-meta`, `--space-2`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--radius-3`.
- Stateless container. No hover or click on the card. All interaction delegated to `cta` slot.
- Do NOT set `featured` on more than one tier in a group ŌĆö semantic ambiguity.
- Do NOT render in isolation at full page width ŌĆö designed for a constrained grid column.
- Do NOT embed multiple CTAs in one tier ŌĆö the slot is singular.
- Do NOT put long prose in `bullets` ŌĆö each item should be Ōēż 8 words.
- Do NOT import `<Stat>` or `<LinkList>` ŌĆö price uses tokens directly; bullets are a plain `<ul>`.

```tsx
// Default tier:
<PriceTier
  name="Starter"
  price="$0"
  bullets={["5 projects", "1 GB storage", "Community support"]}
  cta={<Button variant="secondary" size="md">Get started free</Button>}
/>

// Featured (recommended) tier:
<PriceTier
  featured
  name="Pro"
  price="$29"
  per="month"
  bullets={["Unlimited projects", "100 GB storage", "Priority support"]}
  cta={<Button variant="primary" size="md">Start free trial</Button>}
/>
```

### FeatureGrid
- Responsive grid organism wrapping `FeatureCard` molecules inside a `Section` landmark. For marketing landing pages and feature-overview surfaces.
- Root element: `<section>` via `Section` molecule ŌĆö region landmark when `heading` is provided. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, FeatureGridProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "FeatureGrid"`.
- `heading` (optional string) ŌĆö forwarded to `Section` as `title`; wires `aria-labelledby` on the `<section>`.
- `eyebrow` (optional `string | ReactNode`) ŌĆö forwarded to `Section` as `eyebrow`.
- `lede` (optional `string | ReactNode`) ŌĆö forwarded to `Section` as `lede`.
- `columns` (optional `2 | 3`, default `3`) ŌĆö max column count. `3`: `minmax(16rem, 1fr)`. `2`: `minmax(20rem, 1fr)`. Mobile always collapses to 1 column via `auto-fit`.
- `size` (optional `"default" | "tight"`, default `"default"`) ŌĆö forwarded to `Section`. `"default"` = `--space-16` block padding; `"tight"` = `--space-12`.
- `children` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö idiomatic usage is one or more `<FeatureCard>` instances. Any count supported.
- Grid gap: `--space-6` (24px) narrow; `--space-8` (32px) at `--bp-md` (768px).
- No state, no motion, no interactive behavior. Static layout organism. All interaction lives inside child cards.
- A11y: titled `FeatureGrid` = named region landmark via `aria-labelledby`. Untitled = unlabeled `<section>`. Grid `<div>` is presentational.

```tsx
// (a) Standard three-column grid:
<FeatureGrid eyebrow="Platform" heading="What you get" lede="Supporting copy.">
  <FeatureCard title="Ship faster" body="Days, not months." />
  <FeatureCard title="Scale reliably" body="Automatic routing." />
  <FeatureCard title="Observe everything" body="Every call logged." />
</FeatureGrid>

// (b) Two-column grid for wider cards:
<FeatureGrid columns={2} heading="Enterprise capabilities">
  <FeatureCard title="SSO" body="SAML 2.0 and OIDC." />
  <FeatureCard title="Audit logs" body="Tamper-evident logs." />
</FeatureGrid>

// (c) Anonymous grid (no heading) embedded inside another Section:
<FeatureGrid>
  <FeatureCard title="Feature A" body="No outer heading." />
  <FeatureCard title="Feature B" body="Grid gap still applies." />
</FeatureGrid>
```
```

### LogoCloud
- Canonical "trusted by" / partner logo surface. Section-framed collection of `Logo` atoms in grid or scrolling strip layout.
- Root element: `<section>` via Section molecule. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, LogoCloudProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "LogoCloud"`.
- `variant` (`"grid" | "strip"`, default `"grid"`) ŌĆö grid for curated sets (4ŌĆō12 logos); strip for larger sets or when motion aids browsing.
- `columns` (`2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6`, default `4`) ŌĆö grid only; responsive halved at `< --bp-md`. No effect on strip.
- `divider` (boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö renders a 1px `--hairline` rule above the logo container.
- `heading` (string | ReactNode) ŌĆö passed to Section `title` slot; wires `aria-labelledby` automatically.
- `eyebrow` (string | ReactNode) ŌĆö passed to Section `eyebrow` slot.
- `lede` (string | ReactNode) ŌĆö passed to Section `lede` slot.
- `size` (`"default" | "tight"`, default `"tight"`) ŌĆö passed to Section size prop.
- `children` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö `Logo` atoms. Consumer controls count and order.
- Strip: two track elements (first visible, second `aria-hidden="true"`) for seamless CSS loop. Track animates `translateX(0 ŌåÆ -100%)` via `calc(var(--dur-slow) * 10) linear infinite`. Pauses on `:hover` / `:focus-within`. Reduced-motion: `animation: none`, overflow-x auto.
- A11y: when heading provided, Section wires `aria-labelledby`. Without heading, pass `aria-label` via spread props.
- Tokens: `--space-8` (grid gap), `--space-6` (strip gap), `--space-12` (container padding), `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--dur-slow`, `--bp-md`.

```tsx
// Grid (default):
<LogoCloud eyebrow="Customers" heading="Trusted by teams at" columns={3}>
  <Logo src="/logos/acme.svg" alt="Acme" />
  <Logo src="/logos/globex.svg" alt="Globex" />
</LogoCloud>

// Strip:
<LogoCloud variant="strip" aria-label="Our partners">
  <Logo src="/logos/acme.svg" alt="Acme" />
</LogoCloud>
```

### FailureModeList
- Section-framed organism that collects `FailureMode` molecules into a vertical catalog block. Owns the outer editorial frame so callers never re-roll the Section scaffolding per page.
- Root element: `<Section>` (renders as `<section>`). `forwardRef<HTMLElement, FailureModeListProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "FailureModeList"`.
- Children container: plain `<div class="list">` ŌĆö no gap, no padding. `FailureMode` items own their own borders and spacing.
- `heading` (optional `string | ReactNode`) ŌĆö maps to `Section`'s `title` prop. Named `heading` to avoid collision with `FailureMode`'s own `title` at the call site.
- `eyebrow` (optional `string | ReactNode`) ŌĆö passed through to `Section`.
- `lede` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö passed through to `Section`.
- `size` (optional `"default" | "tight"`, default `"default"`) ŌĆö block padding variant; `"default"` = `--space-16`, `"tight"` = `--space-12`.
- `titleAs` (optional `"h1" | "h2" | "h3"`, default `"h2"`) ŌĆö heading element for the section title.
- `children` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö `FailureMode` nodes.
- A11y: root `<section>` + `aria-labelledby` wired by `Section` when `heading` is provided ŌĆö named landmark region. Always pass `heading`. `FailureMode` children use `<h3>` (default), correct under `FailureModeList`'s `<h2>`.
- Tokens: all inherited from `Section` and `FailureMode`. No new CSS introduced.
- Do NOT use for a single `FailureMode` ŌĆö render it directly. Do NOT nest inside another `Section`. Do NOT use for positive/best-practice content ŌĆö use `PrincipleList`.

```tsx
// (a) Full composition ŌĆö eyebrow + heading + lede + items:
<FailureModeList
  eyebrow="Where things fail"
  heading="How this breaks"
  lede="Common failure modes in AI product teams."
>
  <FailureMode index={1} title="The chatbot-on-top-of-RAG plateau.">
    <p>Most teams stop here.</p>
  </FailureMode>
  <FailureMode index={2} title="Evals as afterthought.">
    <p>Shipped without a measurement loop.</p>
  </FailureMode>
</FailureModeList>

// (b) Tight padding:
<FailureModeList heading="Failure modes" size="tight">
  <FailureMode index={1} title="Missing feedback signal.">
    <p>No improvement is possible without signal.</p>
  </FailureMode>
</FailureModeList>
```

### StepsSection

- Marketing process-explainer organism. Wraps `Section` molecule + a `Stepper` molecule. Renders the "how it works" 3-step row on landing pages.
- Root: `<section>` via Section molecule. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, StepsSectionProps>`. `...rest` spread to root.
- Composes: Section (header / eyebrow / lede), Stepper (numbered steps).
- Tokens: inherits Section spacing; Stepper rhythm tokens.
- Do NOT use for live multi-step flows (signup wizard etc.) ŌĆö that's interactive Stepper territory.

### TestimonialBlock
- Single-testimonial editorial organism. One Quote + one Byline inside a recessed `--surface-section` section band. Optional Portrait slot.
- Root element: `<section>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, TestimonialBlockProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "TestimonialBlock"`.
- `quote` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö testimonial text; rendered in a `<blockquote>`. Accepts `<em>` for inline emphasis.
- `byline` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö attribution row; pass `<Byline name="ŌĆ”" role="ŌĆ”" />`. Required ŌĆö unattributed quotes are not testimonials.
- `portrait` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö avatar or headshot slot. When absent, layout collapses to quote + byline only. Pass `alt=""` or `aria-hidden="true"` when the Byline already names the person.
- `orientation` (optional `"stacked" | "horizontal"`, default `"stacked"`) ŌĆö `"stacked"`: portrait centered above quote; `"horizontal"`: portrait left-aligned beside byline below the quote.
- `align` (optional `"start" | "center"`, default `"center"`) ŌĆö text alignment of quote and byline within the column.
- A11y: `<section>` landmark; `<blockquote>` for the quote; no custom ARIA. `--fg` on `--surface-section` Ōēł 15.6:1 AAA; `--fg-muted` on `--surface-section` Ōēł 4.7:1 AA.
- Tokens: `--surface-section`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--font-serif`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-statement`, `--fs-meta`, `--lh-body`, `--lh-meta`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--space-12`, `--page-pad`, `--content-max`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`.
- Static organism. No state, no animation, no interactive behavior of its own.
- Do NOT use for multiple testimonials ŌĆö use TestimonialCarousel or TestimonialGrid instead.
- Do NOT omit the Byline ŌĆö use a Quote/Statement atom directly for unattributed editorial quotes.
- Do NOT place inside a card or narrow column ŌĆö requires full reading-column width (`--content-max`).

```tsx
// (a) Default (stacked, centered, no portrait):
<TestimonialBlock
  quote="Changed how our team ships."
  byline={<Byline name="Jane Doe" role="Head of Design, Acme" />}
/>

// (b) With portrait (stacked):
<TestimonialBlock
  quote={<>"Changed how our team ships."</>}
  byline={<Byline name="Jane Doe" role="Head of Design, Acme" />}
  portrait={<Portrait src="ŌĆ”" alt="" aspect="1:1" width={120} />}
/>

// (c) Horizontal + start-aligned:
<TestimonialBlock
  orientation="horizontal"
  align="start"
  quote="Accelerated our roadmap by a quarter."
  byline={<Byline name="Alex Kim" role="CTO, Startupco" />}
  portrait={<Portrait src="ŌĆ”" alt="" aspect="1:1" width={120} />}
### BlogPostCard
- Index-card preview organism for a single blog post. Surfaces cover thumbnail (optional), linked title, lede excerpt, Byline, and TagList.
- Root element: `<a>` via `LinkCard` (full-surface anchor). `forwardRef<HTMLAnchorElement, BlogPostCardProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "BlogPostCard"`.
- `href` (required string) ŌĆö destination URL forwarded to LinkCard root anchor.
- `title` (required string) ŌĆö post heading; rendered as `h2` by default or `h3` when `headingLevel={3}`.
- `lede` (required string) ŌĆö short excerpt; capped to 3 lines via `-webkit-line-clamp: 3`.
- `byline` (required ReactNode) ŌĆö accepts a `Byline` instance (avatar + name + date + read time).
- `tags` (optional ReactNode) ŌĆö accepts a `TagList` instance; omitted when undefined.
- `cover` (optional `{ src: string; alt: string }`) ŌĆö cover image at 16:9 aspect ratio above body; omitted when undefined.
- `headingLevel` (optional `2 | 3`, default `2`) ŌĆö semantic heading level; set to `3` when BlogList provides its own section `h2`.
- `tone` (optional `"default" | "subtle"`, default `"default"`) ŌĆö `subtle` uses transparent background for banded section contexts.
- Tokens: `--surface`, `--bg-elevated`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--radius-3`, `--space-4`, `--space-3`, `--space-2`, `--font-serif`, `--fs-card-title`, `--fs-body`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- One tab stop per card. No internal focusable children. Focus ring via `LinkCard` focus-visible styles.
- Do NOT nest interactive elements inside the card. Do NOT use for non-editorial content (use `LinkCard` directly). Do NOT truncate the title.

```tsx
// (a) Text only:
<BlogPostCard
  href="/blog/shipping-with-ai"
  title="Shipping with AI"
  lede="How we closed the gap between pilot and production."
  byline={<Byline name="Arian Zargaran" publishedAt="2024-06-01" readTime="5 min read" />}
  tags={<TagList><Tag>AI</Tag><Tag>Engineering</Tag></TagList>}
### DropdownMenu
- Compound Radix-wrapped menu trigger + floating item list. Canonical pattern for "More" overflow menus, per-row post-card action menus, and page-settings menus. Replaces ad-hoc useState + outside-click listener patterns.
- Compound API: `DropdownMenu.Root` (context provider) ┬Ę `DropdownMenu.Trigger` (asChild-capable anchor) ┬Ę `DropdownMenu.Content` (floating portal panel) ┬Ę `DropdownMenu.Item` (action row, composes MenuItem) ┬Ę `DropdownMenu.Separator` (1px hairline rule). Convenience: `DropdownMenuBasic` (declarative trigger + items array).
- `DropdownMenu.Content` props: `align` (`"start"|"center"|"end"`, default `"start"`) ┬Ę `side` (`"top"|"bottom"|"left"|"right"`, default `"bottom"`) ┬Ę `sideOffset` (number, default `4`) ┬Ę `minWidth` (string, default `"160px"`) ┬Ę `container` (HTMLElement|null).
- `DropdownMenu.Item` props: `tone` (`"default"|"danger"`, default `"default"`) ┬Ę `disabled` (boolean) ┬Ę `onSelect` ((event: Event) => void) ┬Ę `icon` (ReactNode, 16px lucide icon) ┬Ę `shortcut` (string hint). Renders via MenuItem molecule.
- `DropdownMenuBasic` props: `trigger` (ReactNode) ┬Ę `items` (Array<{label, onSelect, tone?, disabled?, icon?, shortcut?}>) ┬Ę `align` (forwarded to Content).
- A11y: Radix manages `aria-haspopup="menu"`, `aria-expanded`, `role="menu"`, `role="menuitem"`, `aria-disabled`, portal, focus return on close. Icon slot is decorative ŌĆö pass `aria-hidden="true"` on icon elements.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--surface`, `--danger`, `--bg-danger`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--lh-meta`, `--space-1`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--radius-2`, `--radius-3`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- Anti-patterns: not for navigation links ┬Ę not for form controls ┬Ę not for >10 items (use Combobox/Select) ┬Ę not as a Select replacement ┬Ę not for always-visible lists.

```tsx
// Compound API
<DropdownMenu.Root>
  <DropdownMenu.Trigger asChild>
    <IconButton icon={MoreHorizontal} aria-label="More actions" variant="ghost" />
  </DropdownMenu.Trigger>
  <DropdownMenu.Content align="end">
    <DropdownMenu.Item icon={<Edit size={16} aria-hidden="true" />} onSelect={handleEdit}>Edit</DropdownMenu.Item>
    <DropdownMenu.Separator />
    <DropdownMenu.Item tone="danger" onSelect={handleDelete}>Delete</DropdownMenu.Item>
  </DropdownMenu.Content>
</DropdownMenu.Root>

// Convenience wrapper
<DropdownMenuBasic
  trigger={<Button variant="secondary">Actions</Button>}
  items={[{ label: "Edit", onSelect: handleEdit }, { label: "Delete", tone: "danger", onSelect: handleDelete }]}
### VideoEmbed
- Responsive iframe wrapper molecule for embedded video (YouTube, Vimeo, generic). Renders a `<figure>` root with a CSS `aspect-ratio` box that prevents Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) as the embed loads. For editorial pages, case studies, and documentation surfaces.
- Root element: `<figure>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, VideoEmbedProps>`. `...rest` spread onto `<figure>`. `displayName = "VideoEmbed"`.
- `src` (string, required) ŌĆö embed URL (YouTube `/embed/`, Vimeo player, or generic).
- `title` (string, required) ŌĆö passed to `<iframe title>`; primary a11y label for screen readers navigating by frame.
- `aspectRatio` (`"16/9" | "4/3" | "1/1" | string`, default `"16/9"`) ŌĆö CSS `aspect-ratio` value. Preset strings map to stable CSS class names; any other string is applied as inline style.
- `lazy` (boolean, default `true`) ŌĆö sets `loading="lazy"` on the iframe. Set `false` for above-fold video.
- `bordered` (boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö adds `--hairline-w solid var(--hairline)` border around the ratio box. Useful in docs contexts.
- `caption` (ReactNode, optional) ŌĆö rendered below the ratio box inside the `<figure>`. Pass a `Caption` molecule.
- A11y: `<figure>` root is the correct semantic wrapper; optional `caption` slot accepts `<figcaption>` / `Caption` molecule for native association. `title` on `<iframe>` is the primary screen-reader label. `allow` attribute set to `"accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"`.
- Tokens: `--radius-3`, `--surface`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--space-4`.
- No Radix dependency. Static presentational ŌĆö no internal state.
- Do NOT use for self-hosted `<video>` elements. Do NOT use for audio embeds. Do NOT use for arbitrary third-party scripts. Do NOT omit `title` prop.

```tsx
// (a) Default YouTube embed:
<VideoEmbed
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ"
  title="Product demo ŌĆö Q4 2024"
### AudioPlayer
- HTML5 audio embed molecule. Wraps `<audio controls>` inside a `<figure>` with an optional Caption row (`<figcaption>`) and an optional transcript link below the controls. Single job: embed one audio file into editorial content (podcast episodes, voice notes, recorded interviews).
- Root element: `<figure>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, AudioPlayerProps>`. `...rest` spread (excluding children). `displayName = "AudioPlayer"`.
- `src` (string, required) ŌĆö audio file URL passed to `<audio src>`. `aria-label` (string, required) ŌĆö accessible label for the `<audio>` element; defaults to `caption` when the caller passes both. `caption` (optional string) ŌĆö short label below controls; rendered via `<Caption as="figcaption">`. `transcriptHref` (optional string) ŌĆö when present, renders a "Read transcript" `<a>` link below the Caption. `transcriptLabel` (optional string, default `"Read transcript"`) ŌĆö overridable link text for localisation. `autoPlay` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö forwarded to `<audio>`; off by default (WCAG 1.4.2). `loop` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö forwarded to `<audio>`. `muted` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö forwarded to `<audio>`. `preload` (`"none" | "metadata" | "auto"`, default `"metadata"`) ŌĆö limits initial network cost while enabling duration display.
- A11y: root `<figure>` has implicit figure role ŌĆö no explicit ARIA role needed. `<audio>` carries `aria-label` for screen readers. Caption renders as `<figcaption>` inside `<figure>` ŌĆö native semantic association. Transcript link is a plain `<a>` with visible text as accessible name. `autoPlay={false}` default satisfies WCAG 1.4.2 (Audio Control). Focus order: `<audio>` first, transcript link second (DOM order).
- Tokens: `--hero-max`, `--space-8`, `--space-2`, `--space-1`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--lh-meta`, `--fg`, `--surface`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--radius-2`, `--radius-1`, `--accent`.
- No Radix dependency. Pure React. Depends on `Caption` molecule.

```tsx
// (a) Full ŌĆö caption + transcript link:
<AudioPlayer
  src="/audio/ep-12.mp3"
  aria-label="Episode 12 ŌĆö Design systems"
  caption="Episode 12 ŌĆö Design systems"
  transcriptHref="/transcripts/ep-12"
### DataTable
- Sortable, filterable, paginated table molecule. Composes `Table` + `Pagination` + `EmptyState` into a single controlled unit. Pure React ŌĆö no TanStack Table or external data-grid dependency.
- Root element: `<section aria-label={caption ?? "Data table"}>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, DataTableProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "DataTable"`.
- Generic over row shape: `DataTable<TRow>`. Consumer passes column definitions and pre-sliced page data; DataTable owns no server-fetch or data-slice logic.
- `columns` (ColumnDef<TRow>[], required) ŌĆö array of `{ id, header, accessor, sortable?, filterable? }`. `accessor` is `(row: TRow) => ReactNode`.
- `rows` (TRow[], required) ŌĆö current page slice. DataTable does not slice ŌĆö consumer passes the right window.
- `sortState` (SortState | null, default null) ŌĆö controlled: `{ columnId: string; direction: "asc" | "desc" }`. Pass null for unsorted.
- `onSortChange` ((next: SortState | null) => void) ŌĆö called on sortable header click. Cycle: null ŌåÆ asc ŌåÆ desc ŌåÆ null.
- `filterState` (FilterState, default {}) ŌĆö `Record<columnId, string[]>`. Metadata only; filter UI lives in consumer `toolbar` slot.
- `onFilterChange` ((next: FilterState) => void) ŌĆö propagated from toolbar controls.
- `page` (number, default 1) ŌĆö current 1-based page.
- `pageSize` (number, default 20) ŌĆö informational; consumer slices data.
- `pageCount` (number, required) ŌĆö total pages. Drives `Pagination`. Pass `Math.ceil(totalRows / pageSize)`.
- `onPageChange` ((page: number) => void) ŌĆö called on page navigation. Pagination is suppressed when omitted or pageCount <= 1.
- `emptyState` (ReactNode) ŌĆö shown when rows.length === 0. Defaults to `<EmptyState title="No results" />`.
- `toolbar` (ReactNode) ŌĆö slot above table. Use for SearchField, filter pickers, segment controls.
- `density` ("compact" | "comfortable", default "comfortable") ŌĆö forwarded to Table.
- `caption` (string, optional) ŌĆö populates `<caption>` (always in DOM, visually hidden) and `aria-label` on root section. Required for a11y when multiple tables are on the page.
- `totalRows` (number, optional) ŌĆö used to build aria-live announcement: "Showing N of M results".
- A11y: `<section aria-label>` = landmark region. `<caption>` always present in DOM (visually hidden). `aria-sort="ascending"|"descending"|"none"` on sortable `<th>`. `aria-live="polite"` region announces row count on state change. Focus moves to first interactive element in tbody (or tbody itself) on page change. `Pagination` handles its own aria-current/aria-label. Empty state is not hidden from AT.
- Tokens: `--space-1`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--radius-2`, `--hairline`. All table/pagination/empty-state tokens inherited from composed molecules.
- No new Radix dependency. No new design tokens.
- Do NOT use for fewer than ~10 rows of static data ŌĆö use `Table` directly. Do NOT use as a spreadsheet (inline cell editing is out of scope). Do NOT nest DataTable inside DataTable.

```tsx
// (a) Controlled sort + pagination:
const [sortState, setSortState] = useState<SortState | null>(null);
const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
const pageSize = 20;
const sorted = [...allRows].sort(/* your sort fn */);
const pageRows = sorted.slice((page - 1) * pageSize, page * pageSize);

<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  rows={pageRows}
  sortState={sortState}
  onSortChange={setSortState}
  page={page}
  pageSize={pageSize}
  pageCount={Math.ceil(allRows.length / pageSize)}
  onPageChange={setPage}
  caption="Scheduled posts"
  totalRows={allRows.length}
/>

// (b) With toolbar filter slot:
<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  rows={filteredRows}
  pageCount={1}
  caption="Comments"
  toolbar={<SearchField value={query} onValueChange={setQuery} placeholder="SearchŌĆ”" />}
/>

// (c) Custom empty state:
<DataTable
  columns={columns}
  rows={[]}
  pageCount={0}
  caption="Posts"
  emptyState={<EmptyState title="No posts yet" action={<Button>Create post</Button>} />}
/>

// (b) Minimal ŌĆö controls only:
<AudioPlayer src="/audio/note.mp3" aria-label="Voice note from Arian" />

// (c) Custom transcript label:
<AudioPlayer
  src="/audio/ep-5.mp3"
  aria-label="Podcast Episode 5"
  caption="Podcast Episode 5 ŌĆö The pivot moment"
  transcriptHref="/transcripts/ep-5"
  transcriptLabel="View full transcript"
/>

// (b) 4/3 Vimeo with Caption:
<VideoEmbed
  src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/148751763"
  title="Design system overview"
  aspectRatio="4/3"
  caption={<Caption>Fig. 1 ŌĆö design system overview, recorded live.</Caption>}
/>

// (c) Above-fold, bordered, eager:
<VideoEmbed
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ"
  title="Hero video"
  lazy={false}
  bordered
/>

// (b) With cover image:
<BlogPostCard
  href="/blog/design-systems"
  title="Design Systems at Scale"
  lede="Token-first architecture for teams shipping across multiple surfaces."
  byline={<Byline name="Arian Zargaran" publishedAt="2024-04-15" />}
  cover={{ src: "/images/ds-cover.jpg", alt: "Design system diagram" }}
  headingLevel={3}
### ComparisonTable
- Feature ├Ś tier pricing comparison matrix organism. Dense, scannable grid for pricing pages.
- Root element: `<section>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, ComparisonTableProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "ComparisonTable"`.
- Renders a semantic `<table>` with `<thead>` (sticky by default) and `<tbody>` groups.
- `tiers` (required `string[] | TierDef[]`) ŌĆö column headers. `TierDef: { label: string; subtext?: string; featured?: boolean }`. String shorthand normalised internally.
- `rows` (required `Array<ComparisonRow | ComparisonGroupHeading>`) ŌĆö `ComparisonRow: { feature: string; values: string[] }`, `ComparisonGroupHeading: { group: string }`. Discriminated by `group` key.
- `striped` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö alternate-row fill via `--surface`.
- `stickyHeader` (optional boolean, default `true`) ŌĆö `position: sticky; top: 0` on `<thead>`.
- `caption` (optional string) ŌĆö rendered as `<caption>`. When absent, consumer must supply `aria-label`.
- `captionVisibility` (optional `"visible" | "sr-only"`, default `"visible"`) ŌĆö visually hides the caption while keeping it accessible.
- `heading` (optional ReactNode) ŌĆö optional section heading rendered above the scroll container.
- A11y: `<th scope="col">` on tier headers; `<th scope="row">` on feature labels; `<th scope="colgroup" colSpan={n}>` on group headings. `<caption>` or `aria-label` required. axe rules: `td-headers-attr`, `th-has-data-cells`, `scope-attr-valid`.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated` (sticky thead bg), `--surface` (striped rows), `--surface-section` (group row bg), `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--fs-meta`, `--fs-micro`, `--font-sans`, `--tracking-micro`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--accent`, `--lh-meta`.
- No interaction, no sort, no filter. Static display only. Use `DataTable` for interactive datasets.

```tsx
// (a) Default 3-tier table with group headings:
<ComparisonTable
  caption="Plan feature comparison"
  tiers={[{ label: "Free" }, { label: "Pro", featured: true }, { label: "Team" }]}
  rows={[
    { group: "Storage" },
    { feature: "Projects", values: ["3", "Unlimited", "Unlimited"] },
    { feature: "Members", values: ["1", "5", "Unlimited"] },
    { group: "Support" },
    { feature: "SLA", values: ["ŌĆö", "Email", "Priority"] },
  ]}
/>

// (b) Shorthand tiers, striped, sr-only caption:
<ComparisonTable
  caption="Plan comparison"
  captionVisibility="sr-only"
  tiers={["Starter", "Pro", "Enterprise"]}
  rows={[{ feature: "API calls", values: ["10k", "100k", "Unlimited"] }]}
  striped
/>
### PriceTier
- Pricing plan card molecule. Presents a single plan: name, price, cadence, optional description, feature bullet list, and CTA slot.
- Root element: `<article aria-labelledby={titleId}>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, PriceTierProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "PriceTier"`.
- `name` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö plan name, rendered as `<h3>` inside the card; auto-assigned `id` for `aria-labelledby`.
- `price` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö price display (e.g. `"$49"`); editorial serif at `--fs-stat` scale.
- `cadence` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö billing label (e.g. `"per month"`); `--fs-meta` / `--fg-muted`.
- `description` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö supporting copy; string ŌåÆ auto-wrapped `<p>`.
- `features` (optional `ReactNode[] | ReactNode`) ŌĆö array ŌåÆ `<ul role="list"><li>` markup; ReactNode ŌåÆ raw slot.
- `cta` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö CTA slot at card bottom; typically a `<Button>` with tier-specific accessible name.
- `featured` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö elevated surface (`--bg-elevated`), `--accent` border, `"Recommended"` label, entrance animation. Hover lift suppressed on featured.
- A11y: `aria-labelledby` wired to `<h3>` id. `"Recommended"` label is in DOM (not pseudo-element). Bullet list uses `<ul role="list">`. CTA accessible name must be tier-specific.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated`, `--accent`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--font-sans`, `--font-serif`, `--fs-card-title`, `--fs-stat`, `--fs-meta`, `--fs-body`, `--lh-body`, `--lh-meta`, `--tracking-stat`, `--tracking-eyebrow`, `--space-2`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--radius-3`, `--easing`, `--dur-fast`.

```tsx
// Standard tier:
<PriceTier
  name="Starter"
  price="$0"
  cadence="free forever"
  features={["5 projects", "Community support"]}
  cta={<Button variant="secondary" asChild><a href="/signup">Get started with Starter</a></Button>}
/>

// Featured tier:
<PriceTier
  featured
  name="Pro"
  price="$49"
  cadence="per month"
  features={["Unlimited projects", "Priority support"]}
  cta={<Button asChild><a href="/signup/pro">Get started with Pro</a></Button>}
/>
### CodeBlock
- Fenced code molecule. Semantic `<figure>` root with optional header bar (language label + copy button), a scrollable `<pre><code>` pane, and an optional `<figcaption>`. No syntax highlighting shipped ŌĆö consumer injects highlighted markup via `children`.
- `children` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö code content. Plain string idiomatic; pre-highlighted markup accepted.
- `language` (optional `string`) ŌĆö short language identifier (e.g. `"tsx"`, `"bash"`). Renders the language label at the leading end of the header bar when present.
- `hideCopy` (optional `boolean`, default `false`) ŌĆö suppresses the copy-to-clipboard button. For decorative/display-only snippets.
- `caption` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö rendered as `<figcaption>` below the code pane. File path, attribution, or explanatory note.
- `className` (optional `string`) ŌĆö merged onto the root `<figure>` via `clsx`.
- Header bar only renders when `language` is set or `hideCopy` is false (i.e. copy button is visible). Absent entirely when both conditions are false.
- Copy button: inline SVG icon, `aria-label="Copy"` at rest / `"Copied"` after success (~1.5s revert). Uses `navigator.clipboard.writeText`; silently no-ops if the API is unavailable.
- Token contract: `--surface`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--radius-3`, `--font-mono`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--fs-micro`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--lh-body`, `--accent` (copy button focus ring), `--radius-1` (copy button focus ring).
- `forwardRef<HTMLElement, CodeBlockProps>`, `displayName="CodeBlock"`. Remaining `ComponentPropsWithoutRef<"figure">` spread onto root.
- Do NOT use for inline code literals ŌĆö use `<Code>`. Do NOT bundle a syntax highlighter inside this primitive. Do NOT set a fixed height ŌĆö height grows with content; consumers constrain externally.

```tsx
// (a) Minimal ŌĆö no language, copy visible:
<CodeBlock>{`const x = 1;`}</CodeBlock>

// (b) With language label:
<CodeBlock language="tsx">{`const x = 1;`}</CodeBlock>

// (c) Hide copy (decorative):
<CodeBlock hideCopy>{`const decorative = true;`}</CodeBlock>

// (d) Full anatomy ŌĆö language + caption:
<CodeBlock language="tsx" caption="src/components/Example.tsx">
  {`const x = 1;`}
</CodeBlock>
### Carousel
- Scroll-snap compound slide container molecule for sequencing discrete content panels horizontally.
- Root element: `<section aria-roledescription="carousel">`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, CarouselRootProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "Carousel.Root"`.
- Compound API: `Carousel.Root` / `Carousel.Track` / `Carousel.Slide` / `Carousel.Prev` / `Carousel.Next` / `Carousel.Indicators`.
- `autoplay` (boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö auto-advance slides every 4 000 ms. Never starts under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`. Pauses on `:hover` and `:focus-within`.
- `loop` (boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö wrap-around navigation. When false, Prev is `disabled` on first slide, Next is `disabled` on last.
- `slidesVisible` (number, default `1`) ŌĆö number of slides in the viewport at once.
- `gap` (string, default `"var(--space-4)"`) ŌĆö inter-slide gap passed as CSS custom property `--carousel-gap`.
- `indicators` (boolean, default `true`) ŌĆö show `Carousel.Indicators` dot row.
- `Carousel.Track`: `<ul tabIndex={0}>` with `scroll-snap-type: x mandatory`, `overscroll-behavior-x: contain`. Focusable for keyboard scroll.
- `Carousel.Slide`: `<li aria-roledescription="slide" aria-label="Slide N of M">`. `scroll-snap-align: start`. 100% track width.
- `Carousel.Prev` / `Carousel.Next`: `<IconButton>` (ghost, md) with `ChevronLeft` / `ChevronRight`. Disabled + `aria-disabled` when at boundary (loop=false).
- `Carousel.Indicators`: `<div role="tablist" aria-label="Slide indicators">`. Each dot: `<button role="tab" aria-selected aria-label="Slide N of M" aria-controls>`. Arrow-key navigation within tablist.
- Live region: `<VisuallyHidden as="div" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true">` announces current slide on change.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--surface`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--accent`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--space-2`, `--space-4`, `--space-8`, `--radius-1`, `--radius-3`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- Motion: `scroll-behavior: smooth` under `prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference`; `auto` under reduce.

```tsx
<Carousel.Root aria-label="Feature highlights">
  <Carousel.Prev />
  <Carousel.Track>
    <Carousel.Slide>Slide one content</Carousel.Slide>
    <Carousel.Slide>Slide two content</Carousel.Slide>
  </Carousel.Track>
  <Carousel.Next />
  <Carousel.Indicators />
</Carousel.Root>
### Sheet
- Side-anchored Dialog variant that slides in from a viewport edge. Use for settings panels, detail views, filter drawers, and mobile navigation ŌĆö contexts where a centered modal feels too disruptive.
- Built on `@radix-ui/react-dialog` (no new dep). Compound API: `Sheet.Root`, `Sheet.Trigger`, `Sheet.Content`, `Sheet.Title`, `Sheet.Description`, `Sheet.Close`.
- `Sheet.Content` props: `side` (`"right" | "left" | "top" | "bottom"`, default `"right"`) ŌĆö which viewport edge; `size` (`"sm" | "md" | "lg" | "full"`, default `"md"`) ŌĆö panel width (right/left: 320/400/560px/100vw) or height (top/bottom: 40/60/80/100vh); `modal` (boolean, default `true`) ŌĆö pass `false` on `Sheet.Root` for non-modal persistent panels. All other `Sheet.Content` props forward to the `<div role="dialog">`.
- `Sheet.Title` required in DOM (visually-hidden if design omits it). `Sheet.Description` optional but recommended. Both wired to `aria-labelledby` / `aria-describedby` by Radix.
- Motion: entrance slides from the `side` edge over `--dur-mid` (`240ms`) using `--easing`. Exit translates back over `--dur-fast` (`180ms`). `prefers-reduced-motion` collapses both to instant via tokens.css global clamp.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--surface`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--radius-3`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--dur-mid`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- Do NOT use Sheet for destructive confirmations (use Dialog). Do NOT stack Sheets. Do NOT omit Sheet.Title from the DOM.

```tsx
// (a) Right panel (default):
<Sheet.Root open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <Sheet.Content side="right" size="md">
    <Sheet.Title>Settings</Sheet.Title>
    <Sheet.Description>Manage your preferences.</Sheet.Description>
    {children}
    <Sheet.Close asChild><Button variant="ghost">Close</Button></Sheet.Close>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>

// (b) Bottom sheet with Trigger:
<Sheet.Root>
  <Sheet.Trigger asChild><Button>Open actions</Button></Sheet.Trigger>
  <Sheet.Content side="bottom" size="sm">
    <Sheet.Title>Actions</Sheet.Title>
    <Sheet.Close asChild><Button variant="ghost">Cancel</Button></Sheet.Close>
  </Sheet.Content>
</Sheet.Root>
### GalleryGrid
- Responsive editorial photo grid organism. Section-framed CSS grid of Portrait thumbnails; click any thumbnail to open an enlarged Dialog overlay (lightbox). Serves "Selected work", "Project screenshots", "Team photos" surfaces. Optional per-image captions below thumbnail and inside Dialog.
- Root element: `<section>` (via Section molecule) wrapping a `<div role="list">` grid. Each item is a `<figure role="listitem">` containing a `<button>` trigger, a Portrait thumbnail, and optional `<figcaption>`. Shared single Dialog.Root instance swaps content on open. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, GalleryGridProps>`. `...rest` spread to Section. `displayName = "GalleryGrid"`.
- `heading` (optional string) ŌĆö Section eyebrow/title rendered as h2; omit for anonymous grids.
- `columns` (`2 | 3 | 4`, default `3`) ŌĆö CSS grid `repeat(n, 1fr)` at Ōēź 768 px. Collapses to 1 col below 480 px, 2 col at 480ŌĆō767 px regardless of prop.
- `gap` (`"default" | "tight"`, default `"default"`) ŌĆö `"default"` uses `--space-4`; `"tight"` uses `--space-2`.
- `items` (GalleryGridItemProps[]) ŌĆö array of `{ src: string; alt: string; caption?: string }`. Each item: `src` passed to Portrait, `alt` required (WCAG 1.1.1), `caption` optional.
- Interaction: click/Enter/Space on thumbnail opens Dialog with enlarged Portrait and caption. Esc, backdrop-click, or close IconButton dismisses Dialog. Focus returns to triggering thumbnail on close.
- Hover: thumbnail opacity transitions to 0.85 over `--dur-fast`. Suppressed by `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`.
- A11y: `<figure>` + `<figcaption>` anatomy. Trigger is a native `<button>` with descriptive `aria-label`. Dialog has `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal="true"`, `aria-labelledby` pointing at visually-hidden title. Close button has `aria-label="Close"`. `alt` required and non-empty on Portrait.
- Tokens: `--space-2`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--fs-micro`, `--fg-muted`, `--font-sans`, `--lh-meta`, `--radius-3`, `--radius-1`, `--accent`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`. Dialog tokens delegated to Dialog atom.
- Depends on: Section (framing), Portrait (thumbnail + enlarged view), Dialog (overlay), IconButton (close button), VisuallyHidden (screen-reader title).

```tsx
// (a) Default 3-column grid with heading:
<GalleryGrid
  heading="Selected work"
  columns={3}
  items={[
    { src: "https://example.com/a.jpg", alt: "Mural on brick wall", caption: "Berlin, 2024" },
    { src: "https://example.com/b.jpg", alt: "Studio interior" },
    { src: "https://example.com/c.jpg", alt: "Landscape at dusk", caption: "Brandenburg, 2023" },
  ]}
/>

// (b) Tight 2-column grid without heading:
<GalleryGrid
  columns={2}
  gap="tight"
  items={[
    { src: "https://example.com/d.jpg", alt: "Portrait against concrete wall", caption: "Series 02" },
    { src: "https://example.com/e.jpg", alt: "Urban street at night" },
  ]}
/>

// (c) 4-column dense grid:
<GalleryGrid heading="Project screenshots" columns={4} items={screenshots} />
### Combobox
- Searchable single-select dropdown molecule. Replaces native `<select>` when the option count makes scrolling without search a UX failure (timezone pickers, page/org pickers, data-source selectors). Multi-select deferred to a future variant.
- Root element: `<div>` containing a `<button role="combobox">` trigger and (when open) a popover `<div>` with a search `<input>` and `<ul role="listbox">`. `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, ComboboxProps>`. `...rest` spread on root. `displayName = "Combobox"`.
- `options` (required `Array<{ value: string; label: string; group?: string }>`) ŌĆö flat array; groups derived from `group` field.
- `value` (optional string) ŌĆö controlled selected value. `defaultValue` (optional string) ŌĆö uncontrolled initial value. `onValueChange` ((value: string) => void) ŌĆö selection callback.
- `placeholder` (optional string, default `"SelectŌĆ”"`) ŌĆö shown in trigger when no value selected.
- `disabled` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö disables trigger; `opacity: 0.5`, no pointer events.
- `invalid` (optional boolean, default `false`) ŌĆö applies `--danger` border to trigger; pairs with Field error state.
- `size` (`"sm" | "md"`, default `"md"`) ŌĆö `sm` uses `--btn-h-sm` (32px) and `--fs-meta`; `md` uses `--btn-h-md` (44px) and `--fs-body`.
- `filter` (optional `(option, query) => boolean`) ŌĆö custom filter; defaults to substring match on `label`.
- `name` (optional string) ŌĆö hidden `<input type="hidden">` for native form submission.
- A11y: trigger is `<button role="combobox" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded aria-controls="{listbox-id}">`. Listbox is `<ul role="listbox" id="{listbox-id}">`. Options are `<li role="option" aria-selected>`. Groups are `<li role="group" aria-label="{group name}">`. Search input is `<input type="text" role="searchbox" aria-label="Search" aria-autocomplete="list" aria-controls="{listbox-id}">`. Popover open ŌåÆ focus moves to search input. Popover close ŌåÆ focus returns to trigger.
- Keyboard: `Enter`/`Space`/`ArrowDown` on trigger opens popover. `ArrowDown`/`ArrowUp` navigates options. `Enter` selects focused option. `Escape` closes popover without selection change. `Tab` closes popover and advances focus.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated`, `--bg`, `--surface`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-soft`, `--hairline-w`, `--accent`, `--accent-glow`, `--danger`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-body`, `--fs-meta`, `--btn-h-md`, `--btn-h-sm`, `--radius-2`, `--radius-3`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- Motion: popover entrance `opacity 0ŌåÆ1` + `translateY(-4px)ŌåÆ0` over `--dur-fast`. `prefers-reduced-motion` handled globally by token block.
- No Radix or cmdk dependency ŌĆö pure React with ARIA combobox pattern. Uncontrolled open state (Phase 1); programmatic control deferred.
- Compose with `<Field>` for label + error anatomy. Always rendered inside a `<Field>` in standard usage.
- Do NOT use for fewer than ~10 options (use native `<select>`). Do NOT use for multi-select, command palette, free-text autocomplete, or navigation menus.

```tsx
// (a) Controlled inside Field:
const [tz, setTz] = useState("");
<Field label="Timezone" id="tz">
  <Combobox id="tz" options={TIMEZONES} value={tz} onValueChange={setTz} placeholder="Select timezoneŌĆ”" />
</Field>

// (b) Grouped options:
<Combobox
  options={[
    { value: "react", label: "React", group: "Frontend" },
    { value: "node", label: "Node.js", group: "Backend" },
  ]}
  value={value}
  onValueChange={setValue}
  placeholder="Select technologyŌĆ”"
  aria-label="Technology"
/>

// (c) With form submission:
<Combobox options={TIMEZONES} value={tz} onValueChange={setTz} name="timezone" aria-label="Timezone" />

// (d) Invalid (Field wires error):
<Field label="Timezone" id="tz-err" error="Please select a timezone.">
  <Combobox id="tz-err" options={TIMEZONES} value="" onValueChange={() => {}} />
</Field>

// (e) Small size:
<Combobox options={OPTIONS} size="sm" value={v} onValueChange={setV} aria-label="Size" />
### Accordion
- Collapsible-disclosure group molecule. Use when two or more items form a logical group and must be progressively disclosed. Supports `type="single"` (one item open at a time) and `type="multiple"` (any number open simultaneously). Built on `@radix-ui/react-accordion`.
- Compound API: `Accordion.Root` (owns type/value/tone), `Accordion.Item` (one trigger + content pair), `Accordion.Trigger` (full-width button row with trailing chevron), `Accordion.Content` (animated height-collapse panel).
- `Accordion.Root` props: `type` (`"single" | "multiple"`, default `"single"`), `collapsible` (boolean, default `true`, single only), `value` (controlled), `defaultValue` (uncontrolled), `onValueChange` (handler), `tone` (`"default" | "tinted"`, default `"default"`). All standard `div` props forwarded.
- `Accordion.Item` props: `value` (string, required), `disabled` (boolean, default `false`). `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement>`. `...rest` spread.
- `Accordion.Trigger` props: `children` (ReactNode ŌĆö the label). Chevron (`ChevronDown`, `--icon-sm`) always rendered by DS, `aria-hidden="true"`. `forwardRef<HTMLButtonElement>`. `...rest` spread.
- `Accordion.Content` props: `children` (ReactNode). `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement>`. `...rest` spread. Background: `--bg` (default) or `--surface` (tinted tone).
- A11y: Radix wires `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `role="region"`, `aria-labelledby`. Chevron is `aria-hidden`. Keyboard: Space/Enter toggle; Arrow Up/Down move focus; Home/End jump to first/last.
- Tokens: `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--bg`, `--surface`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-body`, `--lh-body`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`, `--icon-sm`.
- Motion: height animates via Radix CSS custom property `--radix-accordion-content-height`. Chevron rotates 180┬░ on open. `prefers-reduced-motion` handled globally by `tokens.css`.

```tsx
// (a) Single, collapsible FAQ:
<Accordion.Root type="single" collapsible defaultValue="q1">
  <Accordion.Item value="q1">
    <Accordion.Trigger>What is Poukai?</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content><p>A senior-only AI consulting practice.</p></Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item value="q2">
    <Accordion.Trigger>How do engagements work?</Accordion.Trigger>
    <Accordion.Content><p>Scoped, time-boxed, production-focused.</p></Accordion.Content>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion.Root>

// (b) Multiple, all independent:
<Accordion.Root type="multiple">
  <Accordion.Item value="build"><Accordion.Trigger>Build</Accordion.Trigger><Accordion.Content><p>...</p></Accordion.Content></Accordion.Item>
  <Accordion.Item value="automate"><Accordion.Trigger>Automate</Accordion.Trigger><Accordion.Content><p>...</p></Accordion.Content></Accordion.Item>
</Accordion.Root>
```

### PricingTable
- Pricing page organism. Frames a responsive CSS grid of `PriceTier` molecules with optional heading and comparison body slots.
- Root element: `<section>` with `--surface-section` band. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, PricingTableProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "PricingTable"`.
- `children` (required `ReactNode`) ŌĆö one or more `PriceTier` children; canonical 2ŌĆō3, max 4.
- `heading` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö slot above the grid; auto-wires `aria-labelledby` on the root `<section>`.
- `comparison` (optional `ReactNode`) ŌĆö slot below the grid; for `ComparisonTable` / `ComparisonRow` organism.
- `columns` (optional `2 | 3 | "auto"`, default `"auto"`) ŌĆö `"auto"` uses CSS `minmax` for responsive collapse; explicit values lock column count.
- `align` (optional `"top" | "stretch"`, default `"stretch"`) ŌĆö `"stretch"` equalises card heights; `"top"` lets cards size to content.
- A11y: `<section>` is region landmark; `aria-labelledby` auto-set when `heading` provided. Tier grid is presentational `<div>`, not ARIA grid. Pass `aria-label` via spread when no heading slot is used.
- Tokens: `--surface-section`, `--page-pad`, `--content-max`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--space-12`, `--space-16`.

```tsx
<PricingTable heading={<h2>Choose your plan</h2>}>
  <PriceTier name="Starter" price="$0" cadence="free forever" ... />
  <PriceTier featured name="Pro" price="$49" cadence="per month" ... />
  <PriceTier name="Enterprise" price="Custom" ... />
</PricingTable>
```
### NewsletterSection
- Organism layer. Section-framed email signup surface ŌĆö the canonical "end-of-post / footer signup" moment.
- Composes `Section` molecule (landmark, vertical rhythm, header block) with a `NewsletterField` molecule passed as the `field` prop slot.
- Props: `heading` (required string ŌĆö h2 text), `field` (required ReactNode ŌĆö a `<NewsletterField>` instance), `body` (optional string | ReactNode ŌĆö lede), `eyebrow` (optional string | ReactNode), `size` (`"default"` | `"tight"`), `surface` (boolean ŌĆö applies `--surface-section` bg), `titleAs` (`"h2"` | `"h3"`), `as` (`"section"` | `"article"` | `"div"`).
- `surface` maps to exactly one token (`--surface-section`). No other background tinting.
- `titleAs="h3"` when nested below an existing `h2` surface (e.g. inside an `<article>`).
- A11y: root `<section>` is a region landmark via `aria-labelledby` (wired by Section). `heading` is required so the landmark is always named.
- Do NOT proxy `NewsletterField` props through this organism ŌĆö consumer configures the field directly.
- Do NOT use for multi-field forms, product signup, or as a primary page hero (`HeroSection` is the h1 moment).
- Do NOT center-align heading or body copy ŌĆö left-alignment is the brand register.
- Import: `import { NewsletterSection } from "@poukai-inc/ui"` or `"@poukai-inc/ui/organisms/NewsletterSection"`.

### Header

`src/organisms/Header/` ŌĆö standalone site nav-bar organism. Use on surfaces that need a top navigation row **outside of** `SiteShell`. Do NOT nest inside `SiteShell`.

Compound API: `<Header>`, `<Header.Brand>`, `<Header.Nav>`, `<Header.Actions>`.

```tsx
<Header homeHref="/" sticky bordered>
  <Header.Nav>
    <li><NavLink href="/why-ai">Why AI</NavLink></li>
    <li><NavLink href="/roles" active>Roles</NavLink></li>
  </Header.Nav>
  <Header.Actions>
    <Button asChild variant="primary"><a href="mailto:hello@pouk.ai">Contact</a></Button>
  </Header.Actions>
</Header>
```

Props (`HeaderProps`): `homeHref?: string` (default `"/"`), `logo?: ReactNode` (overrides `<Wordmark>`), `navLabel?: string` (default `"Primary"`, forwarded to `<nav aria-label>`), `sticky?: boolean` (default `false` ŌĆö `position: sticky; top: 0`; adds hairline via `IntersectionObserver` on scroll), `bordered?: boolean` (default `false` ŌĆö always-on hairline bottom border), `constrained?: boolean` (default `false` ŌĆö caps band at `--content-max`).

- Root: semantic `<header>` with implicit `banner` landmark. One per page.
- `Header.Brand`: `<a aria-label="Poukai ŌĆö home">` wrapping `<Wordmark height={56}>` (or `logo` prop). Focus ring: `2px solid var(--accent)` at `4px` offset.
- `Header.Nav`: `<nav aria-label="Primary">` containing `<ul>` of children. Hides below 768px (mobile menu deferred to Sheet/Drawer organism).
- `Header.Actions`: flex container, renders children directly. Omit when no actions needed.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--dur-fast`, `--dur-mid`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--page-pad`, `--content-max`.
- No state unless `sticky=true` (scroll sentinel via `IntersectionObserver`).
### ArticleHeader
- Organism layer. Canonical top-of-article block for long-form surfaces ŌĆö blog posts, docs pages, case studies.
- Composes: `Eyebrow` atom (category label) ŌåÆ `Heading` atom (`<h1>` title) ŌåÆ `Text` atom (lede) ŌåÆ `byline` slot ŌåÆ optional `share` slot.
- Root element: `<header>` inside `<article>`. `forwardRef<HTMLElement, ArticleHeaderProps>`. `...rest` spread to root.
- Props: `eyebrow` (required `string`), `title` (required `ReactNode` ŌĆö supports `<em>` for serif-italic accent), `lede` (required `string`), `byline` (required `ReactNode` ŌĆö accepts `<Byline>`), `share` (optional `ReactNode` ŌĆö accepts `<ShareLinks>`), `divider` (boolean, default `false` ŌĆö hairline rule below block).
- `<header>` scoped within `<article>` sectioning content is an article-level landmark, not a page-level banner. Consumer must wrap in `<article>`.
- One `<h1>` per page rule applies. Do NOT place a second `<h1>` below ArticleHeader on the same page.
- Tokens: `--fs-micro`, `--tracking-eyebrow`, `--fg-muted`, `--font-sans`, `--font-serif`, `--fs-tagline-intimate`, `--fg`, `--fs-body`, `--space-2`, `--space-6`, `--space-4`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--space-8`, `--space-10`.
- Do NOT use for marketing hero moments ŌĆö use `Hero` or `HeroSection` instead. Editorial long-form only.
- Import: `import { ArticleHeader } from "@poukai-inc/ui"` or `"@poukai-inc/ui/organisms/ArticleHeader"`.
- Usage: `<article><ArticleHeader eyebrow="Engineering" title={<>Why we build with <em>AI</em>.</>} lede="Summary." byline={<Byline name="Arian" publishedAt="2026-05-24" />} /></article>`
### DatePicker

- Calendar-based date input molecule. Composes an `Input` trigger + `@radix-ui/react-popover` to surface a token-styled calendar grid.
- API: `<DatePicker value={...} onValueChange={...} />` with optional `min`, `max`, `disabled`, `aria-label`. Value is an ISO date string (`YYYY-MM-DD`).
- Root: `<div>` wrapping the trigger Input + portaled calendar. `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, DatePickerProps>`. `...rest` spread on root.
- Tokens: `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--surface`, `--surface-section`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--radius-2`, `--space-1`/`--space-2`/`--space-3`. No new tokens.
- A11y: trigger has `aria-haspopup="dialog"`, popover content is `role="dialog"`. Calendar uses `role="grid"`, days `role="gridcell"`. Keyboard nav (arrows / Home / End / PageUp/Down / Enter / Esc) inside the calendar.
- Reduced motion: enter/exit motion collapses to instant under `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`.
- Adds new Radix peer dep `@radix-ui/react-popover`.
- Do NOT use for time selection ŌĆö use `TimePicker`. Do NOT use for free-text date entry ŌĆö use a plain `Input` with validation.
### ContextMenu

- Radix-wrapped right-click / long-press menu. Compound API: `ContextMenu.Root`, `ContextMenu.Trigger` (asChild ŌĆö wraps a region, no visible trigger), `ContextMenu.Content`, `ContextMenu.Item` (composes the MenuItem molecule), `ContextMenu.Separator`.
- Built on `@radix-ui/react-context-menu`. Runtime-destructured Radix imports (see Toast) avoid CT bundler collisions.
- Tokens consumed: `--surface`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--radius-2`, spacing tokens. No new tokens.
- Content portals to `document.body`; tests query via `page.locator(...)` not `component.locator(...)`.
- Use for: file-row menus, canvas-item menus, table-row right-click. Trigger fires on `contextmenu` event and long-press on touch.
- Do NOT use for click-triggered menus ŌĆö use `DropdownMenu`. Do NOT replace `Sheet` or `Dialog`.
### FAQItem
- Single collapsible question-and-answer row for FAQ surfaces. Thin wrapper around `Accordion.Item` + `Accordion.Trigger` + `Accordion.Content`. Must be placed inside an `<Accordion.Root>` wrapper ŌĆö Radix's keyboard model and open/closed state management require the wrapper.
- `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, FAQItemProps>`. `displayName = "FAQItem"`. `...rest` spread to `Accordion.Item`.
- `question` (string, required) ŌĆö question text; rendered as a heading inside the trigger button. `value` (string, required) ŌĆö unique key for Accordion state (Radix requirement). `questionAs` (`"h2" | "h3" | "h4"`, default `"h3"`) ŌĆö heading level; h3 is correct when FAQItem sits inside a Section with an h2 title; override to h2 for standalone FAQ with no parent heading. `children` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö answer content; consumers pass `<Prose>` or a plain paragraph.
- No `defaultOpen` prop ŌĆö set `defaultValue` on the parent `<Accordion.Root>` instead. FAQItem holds no open/closed state of its own.
- A11y: Radix wires `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `role="region"`, `aria-labelledby` automatically. `questionAs` controls heading level; default h3 is correct when FAQItem lives under a Section h2. Keyboard: Space/Enter toggle; Arrow Up/Down move focus; Home/End jump to first/last (Radix keyboard model).
- Tokens: `--fg`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-h3`, `--lh-body` (question heading); all other tokens inherited from Accordion (`--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--fg-muted`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--dur-fast`, `--dur-mid`, `--easing`, `--icon-sm`).
- Depends on: `Accordion` molecule (`@radix-ui/react-accordion`).

```tsx
// (a) Single FAQ list (most common):
<Accordion.Root type="single" collapsible defaultValue="q1">
  <FAQItem value="q1" question="What is Poukai?">
    <p>A senior-only AI consulting practice that ships production systems end-to-end.</p>
  </FAQItem>
  <FAQItem value="q2" question="Who do you work with?">
    <p>Founders and platform teams bridging pilot and production.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</Accordion.Root>

// (b) Multiple open simultaneously:
<Accordion.Root type="multiple">
  <FAQItem value="build" question="What do you build?">
    <p>Custom AI pipelines and production-grade integrations.</p>
  </FAQItem>
  <FAQItem value="advise" question="Do you advise?">
    <p>Yes ŌĆö advisory engagements for model selection, safety, and scale.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</Accordion.Root>

// (c) Override heading level for standalone FAQ (no parent heading):
<Accordion.Root type="single" collapsible>
  <FAQItem value="s1" question="Is FAQItem accessible?" questionAs="h2">
    <p>Yes ŌĆö Radix wires all required ARIA attributes automatically.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</Accordion.Root>
### ArticleLayout
- Single-column long-form reading template organism. Owns the reading-measure container and a CSS grid with named width slots (`text`, `wide`, `bleed`) for editorial content blocks.
- Root element: `<article>` (default) or `<div>` (when `as="div"`). `forwardRef<HTMLElement, ArticleLayoutProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "ArticleLayout"`.
- `as` (`"article" | "div"`, default `"article"`) ŌĆö override to `"div"` when nested inside an existing `<article>` (e.g. inside `DocsLayout`) to avoid invalid landmark nesting.
- `header` (optional ReactNode) ŌĆö rendered above the content grid, constrained to `text` column width. Canonical value: `<ArticleHeader>`. When omitted, no header slot is emitted.
- `children` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö article body. Direct children land in the `text` column (reading measure) by default. Wide/bleed children opt in via layout wrapper classes.
- Content grid: CSS grid with three named column tracks: `text` (reading measure, `min(65ch, 100%)`), `wide` (`min(var(--content-max), 100%)`), `bleed` (`var(--content-max-bleed)`). Children default to `text` track.
- TOKEN FALLBACK: `text` column uses hardcoded `65ch` because `--article-measure` does not yet exist in `tokens.css`. Replace with `var(--article-measure)` once that token is ratified.
- A11y: `<article>` root carries the `article` landmark role. Assistive technology users can jump to it from the landmarks list. No ARIA attributes added by `ArticleLayout` itself ŌĆö semantic structure provided by slotted children. `bleed`-width children must not create horizontal scroll; consumer ensures `overflow-x: hidden/clip` on root if bleed is used.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--page-pad`, `--space-8`, `--space-12`, `--space-16`, `--content-max`, `--content-max-bleed`.
- Static layout shell. No interactive behavior. No focus management. No scroll orchestration.
- Do NOT use as a general page layout ŌĆö for single-column long-form reading surfaces only. Do NOT nest `SiteShell` inside `ArticleLayout`. Do NOT place interactive shell elements (nav, global header) inside the article grid.

```tsx
// (a) Basic usage:
<ArticleLayout
  header={<ArticleHeader title="The case for AI fluency" />}
>
  <Prose>
    <p>Long-form body copyŌĆ”</p>
  </Prose>
</ArticleLayout>

// (b) No header:
<ArticleLayout>
  <Prose>
    <p>Article without a dedicated header slot.</p>
  </Prose>
</ArticleLayout>

// (c) Nested inside DocsLayout (avoid double article landmark):
<ArticleLayout as="div" header={<ArticleHeader title="Installation" />}>
  <Prose>ŌĆ”</Prose>
</ArticleLayout>
### CommandPalette
- cmdk-driven search + navigation overlay organism (ŌīśK). Renders a Dialog organism wrapping a `cmdk` Command surface for fuzzy-filtered, keyboard-navigable item lists.
- Root element: `<dialog>` (via Radix Dialog portal). `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, CommandPaletteRootProps>`. `displayName = "CommandPalette"`.
- Compound API: `CommandPalette` (root) + `CommandPalette.Input` + `CommandPalette.List` + `CommandPalette.Group` + `CommandPalette.Item` + `CommandPalette.Empty`.
- `open` (boolean, required) ŌĆö controlled open state.
- `onOpenChange` ((open: boolean) => void, required) ŌĆö dismiss callback; fires on Esc or backdrop click.
- `placeholder` (optional string, default `"SearchŌĆ”"`) ŌĆö input placeholder text.
- `children` (ReactNode) ŌĆö `CommandPalette.Group`, `CommandPalette.Item`, and `CommandPalette.Empty` nodes.
- `CommandPalette.Group` sub-component: `heading` (string, required) ŌĆö group label. `children` (ReactNode). `className` (optional string).
- `CommandPalette.Item` sub-component: `onSelect` (optional `(value: string) => void`) ŌĆö fires on Enter or click. `icon` (optional ReactNode) ŌĆö leading icon. `shortcut` (optional string) ŌĆö trailing kbd hint. `value` (optional string) ŌĆö override cmdk filter value. `disabled` (optional boolean). `children` (ReactNode). `className` (optional string).
- `CommandPalette.Empty` sub-component: `children` (ReactNode) ŌĆö shown when no items match the current query. `className` (optional string).
- `CommandPalette.Input` sub-component: full `<input>` prop passthrough; for consumers who want to place the input manually outside the root. `className` (optional string).
- `CommandPalette.List` sub-component: `children` (ReactNode). `className` (optional string).
- A11y: wraps Radix `Dialog.Content` (`role="dialog"`, focus trap, Esc dismiss). cmdk emits `role="combobox"` on input and `role="listbox"` + `role="option"` on items. `aria-label="Command palette"` on Dialog.Content. Footer navigation hints are `aria-hidden="true"`. Search icon is `aria-hidden="true"`.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--surface`, `--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--accent`, `--accent-glow`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-body`, `--fs-meta`, `--radius-3`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`.
- Peer dep: `cmdk >=1.0.0`. Runtime dep: `@radix-ui/react-dialog` (via Dialog organism).
- ŌīśK wiring is the consumer's responsibility ŌĆö the component only accepts `open` + `onOpenChange`.
- Do NOT use for settings forms or navigation menus ŌĆö use Dialog or Sidebar respectively.
- Do NOT use when the item list is static and small ŌĆö use a Disclosure or Select instead.

```tsx
// (a) Basic controlled palette with ŌīśK wiring:
const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
useEffect(() => {
  const handler = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === "k") {
      e.preventDefault();
      setOpen(true);
    }
  };
  window.addEventListener("keydown", handler);
  return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", handler);
}, []);

<CommandPalette open={open} onOpenChange={setOpen} placeholder="SearchŌĆ”">
  <CommandPalette.Group heading="Pages">
    <CommandPalette.Item onSelect={() => navigate("/dashboard")}>Dashboard</CommandPalette.Item>
    <CommandPalette.Item onSelect={() => navigate("/docs")}>Documentation</CommandPalette.Item>
  </CommandPalette.Group>
  <CommandPalette.Group heading="Actions">
    <CommandPalette.Item icon={<Settings size={16} />} shortcut="Ōīś," onSelect={() => navigate("/settings")}>
      Settings
    </CommandPalette.Item>
  </CommandPalette.Group>
  <CommandPalette.Empty>No results found.</CommandPalette.Empty>
</CommandPalette>

// (b) With icon and shortcut on item:
<CommandPalette.Item icon={<FileText size={16} />} shortcut="ŌīśD" onSelect={handleSelect}>
  Documents
</CommandPalette.Item>

// (c) Disabled item:
<CommandPalette.Item disabled onSelect={() => {}}>Unavailable action</CommandPalette.Item>
```

### FAQSection
- Section-framed Accordion of FAQItem children. Use on marketing and pricing pages whenever a collapsible Q&A block is needed. Composes a `Section` molecule (named landmark region, eyebrow, title, lede) with an `Accordion.Root` containing `FAQItem` children. The Section `<section aria-labelledby>` gives the FAQ block proper region semantics.
- `forwardRef<HTMLElement, FAQSectionProps>`. `displayName = "FAQSection"`. `...rest` spread to the Section root element.
- `eyebrow` (`string | ReactNode`, optional) ŌĆö eyebrow above the title, e.g. `"FAQ"`. `title` (`ReactNode`, default `"Frequently asked questions"`) ŌĆö Section heading; a default prevents an empty landmark. `titleAs` (`"h1" | "h2" | "h3"`, default `"h2"`) ŌĆö heading level; override to `"h3"` when nested below another `h2`. `lede` (`ReactNode`, optional) ŌĆö supporting copy below the title. `size` (`"default" | "tight"`, default `"default"`) ŌĆö Section block padding: `--space-16` (64px) or `--space-12` (48px). `type` (`"single" | "multiple"`, default `"single"`) ŌĆö passed to `Accordion.Root`; `"single"` collapses siblings on open, `"multiple"` allows concurrent open items. `defaultValue` (`string | string[]`, optional) ŌĆö pre-opened item(s) passed to `Accordion.Root`. `children` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö one or more `<FAQItem>` elements.
- `collapsible` on the Accordion is always `true` when `type="single"` ŌĆö all items can be closed so users are never trapped in an expanded state.
- A11y: `Section` root renders `<section aria-labelledby={titleId}>` ŌĆö the FAQ block is a named region landmark. Accordion implements the ARIA Accordion pattern via Radix: each trigger is `<button aria-expanded aria-controls>` inside a heading element; each panel is `role="region" aria-labelledby`. FAQItem question headings default to h3 (correct under an h2 Section title). Keyboard: Space/Enter toggle; Arrow Up/Down move focus between triggers; Home/End jump to first/last.
- Tokens: all tokens inherited from `Section` (`--space-16`, `--space-12`, `--space-2`, `--space-4`, `--space-12`, `--hero-max`) and `Accordion`/`FAQItem` (`--fg`, `--fg-muted`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-h3`, `--fs-body`, `--lh-body`, `--space-6`, `--accent`, `--radius-1`, `--dur-mid`, `--easing`, `--icon-sm`).
- Depends on: `Section` molecule, `Accordion` molecule (`@radix-ui/react-accordion`), `FAQItem` molecule.

```tsx
// (a) Standard FAQ section (most common):
<FAQSection eyebrow="FAQ" title="Frequently asked questions">
  <FAQItem value="q1" question="What is Poukai?">
    <p>A senior-only AI consulting practice that ships production systems end-to-end.</p>
  </FAQItem>
  <FAQItem value="q2" question="Who do you work with?">
    <p>Founders and platform teams bridging pilot and production.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</FAQSection>

// (b) With lede and default open:
<FAQSection
  eyebrow="FAQ"
  title="Frequently asked questions"
  lede="Everything you need to know about working with Poukai."
  defaultValue="q1"
>
  <FAQItem value="q1" question="What is Poukai?">
    <p>A senior-only AI consulting practice.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</FAQSection>

// (c) Multiple open simultaneously:
<FAQSection title="FAQ" type="multiple" defaultValue={["q1", "q2"]}>
  <FAQItem value="q1" question="Do you take retainers?">
    <p>Yes ŌĆö some engagements evolve into ongoing advisory relationships.</p>
  </FAQItem>
  <FAQItem value="q2" question="What industries?">
    <p>B2B SaaS, fintech, and professional services.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</FAQSection>

// (d) Tight padding, nested h3 override:
<FAQSection title="More questions" titleAs="h3" size="tight">
  <FAQItem value="q1" question="Nested FAQ item" questionAs="h4">
    <p>Answer content here.</p>
  </FAQItem>
</FAQSection>
### ToastItem
- Declarative compound Toast molecule. Single Radix `Toast.Root` item with named sub-parts: `ToastItem`, `ToastItem.Title`, `ToastItem.Description`, `ToastItem.Close`, `ToastItem.Action`.
- Complements the imperative `Toast` organism (`ToastProvider` + `useToast()`). Use `ToastItem` when you need declarative control over individual toast items; use `useToast()` for queue management.
- Must be rendered inside a Radix `<Toast.Provider>` + `<Toast.Viewport>`. The organism's `ToastProvider` already provides both.
- Root element: `<li>` (Radix `Toast.Root` renders as `li`). `forwardRef<HTMLLIElement, ToastItemProps>`. `displayName = "ToastItem"`.
- `tone` (`"info" | "success" | "warning" | "danger"`, default `"info"`) ŌĆö visual + semantic tone. Maps to Radix `type`: info/success ŌåÆ `"background"` (polite live region); warning/danger ŌåÆ `"foreground"` (assertive live region).
- `open` (optional boolean) ŌĆö controlled open state. `defaultOpen` (optional boolean) ŌĆö uncontrolled initial open. `onOpenChange` ((open: boolean) => void) ŌĆö dismissal callback. `duration` (optional number, default `5000`) ŌĆö auto-dismiss ms.
- Sub-parts: `ToastItem.Title` ŌĆö optional heading, `font-weight: 500`. `ToastItem.Description` ŌĆö body copy. `ToastItem.Close` ŌĆö 20├Ś20 close button with X icon, `aria-label="Close"`. `ToastItem.Action` ŌĆö inline action button; requires `altText` prop (Radix requirement for screen-reader alternative).
- Tone contract: info ŌåÆ `--bg-elevated`, hairline border, `--fg`; success ŌåÆ `--bg-elevated`, `--accent` left-rule, `--fg`; warning ŌåÆ `--bg-warning`, `--warning` left-rule, `--fg-on-warning`; danger ŌåÆ `--bg-danger`, `--danger` left-rule, `--fg-on-danger`.
- Tokens: `--bg-elevated`, `--bg-warning`, `--bg-danger`, `--fg`, `--fg-on-warning`, `--fg-on-danger`, `--accent`, `--warning`, `--danger`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--font-sans`, `--fs-meta`, `--lh-meta`, `--lh-body`, `--space-1`, `--space-2`, `--space-3`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--radius-1`, `--radius-2`, `--dur-fast`, `--easing`, `--page-pad`.

```tsx
// Basic success toast:
<Toast.Provider>
  <ToastItem tone="success" open onOpenChange={setOpen}>
    <ToastItem.Title>Saved</ToastItem.Title>
    <ToastItem.Description>Your changes have been saved.</ToastItem.Description>
    <ToastItem.Close />
  </ToastItem>
  <Toast.Viewport />
</Toast.Provider>

// With action:
<ToastItem tone="danger" open onOpenChange={setOpen}>
  <ToastItem.Description>Deployment failed.</ToastItem.Description>
  <ToastItem.Action altText="Retry the deployment" onClick={handleRetry}>
    Retry
  </ToastItem.Action>
  <ToastItem.Close />
</ToastItem>
```

### DocsLayout
- Three-column page template organism for documentation surfaces. Composes Sidebar (left), a center content slot (typically `ArticleLayout as="div"`), and an optional TableOfContents or `<nav>` (right).
- Root element: `<div>` ŌĆö CSS grid container with named template areas (`sidebar`, `content`, `toc`). `forwardRef<HTMLDivElement, DocsLayoutProps>`. `...rest` spread. `displayName = "DocsLayout"`.
- `sidebar` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö Sidebar organism rendered as a sticky left column at `>= 768px`. At mobile (`< 768px`), hidden from flow; accessible via a hamburger trigger button that opens a slide-in drawer (`role="dialog" aria-modal="true"`).
- `toc` (ReactNode, optional) ŌĆö Right-rail column. When omitted, the grid reflows to two columns (`sidebar` + `content`). Do not pass an empty node ŌĆö omit entirely to suppress the right rail (an empty `<aside>` is a landmark anti-pattern).
- `sidebarLabel` (string, default `"Menu"`) ŌĆö `aria-label` for the mobile trigger button and the mobile drawer `role="dialog"`. Consumers localise this string.
- `children` (ReactNode, required) ŌĆö Center content slot. No reading-measure constraint here; pass `<ArticleLayout as="div">` to avoid double `article` landmark nesting.
- Responsive: collapses to single column at `< 768px` (--bp-md); TOC hidden at `< 1024px`. Sidebar collapses to a slide-in drawer at mobile with a hamburger trigger (`aria-expanded` toggled, `aria-controls` pointing to drawer id).
- A11y: desktop sidebar wrapped in `<aside aria-label="Sidebar navigation">`. TOC wrapped in `<aside aria-label="On this page">` when present. Mobile drawer has `role="dialog" aria-modal="true"`. No skip link ŌĆö parent shell (`SiteShell`) provides that.
- Tokens: `--bg`, `--fg`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-w`, `--space-4`, `--space-6`, `--space-8`, `--space-12`, `--page-pad`, `--dur-fast`, `--docs-sidebar-w` (consumer override, default `240px`), `--docs-toc-w` (consumer override, default `220px`).
- Do NOT use for marketing pages (use `SiteShell` + `Section` bands). Do NOT nest DocsLayout inside another DocsLayout. Do NOT pass `ArticleLayout` as the `sidebar` prop. Do NOT leave an empty right-rail placeholder when `toc` is omitted.

```tsx
// (a) Full three-column layout:
<DocsLayout
  sidebar={
    <Sidebar>
      <Sidebar.Group heading="Getting started">
        <LinkList.Item href="/docs/intro">Introduction</LinkList.Item>
      </Sidebar.Group>
    </Sidebar>
  }
  toc={<nav aria-label="On this page"><ul><li><a href="#intro">Intro</a></li></ul></nav>}
>
  <ArticleLayout as="div">
    <Prose><p>Page content</p></Prose>
  </ArticleLayout>
</DocsLayout>

// (b) Two-column (no TOC):
<DocsLayout sidebar={<Sidebar>ŌĆ”</Sidebar>}>
  <ArticleLayout as="div">ŌĆ”</ArticleLayout>
</DocsLayout>

// (c) Custom mobile label for localisation:
<DocsLayout sidebar={<Sidebar>ŌĆ”</Sidebar>} sidebarLabel="Navigation">
  <ArticleLayout as="div">ŌĆ”</ArticleLayout>
</DocsLayout>
```
